# Delivery Plan

**Created:** 2026-03-17

## Summary
Five features need Builder work following recent spec updates. cdd_startup_controls is HIGH-complexity (13 scenario changes + fixture tag) and gets a dedicated phase. The remaining four LOW-complexity features are grouped by dependency order: Phases 1 and 2 are independent (parallel-capable), Phase 3 depends on Phase 1.
